title: The Unexpected Roommate
content:
Lin Yu stood at the door of his new apartment, key in hand. He had just moved to the city for college and was looking forward to some peace and quiet. But as he opened the door, he was greeted by a scene he never expected.

A girl with messy brown hair was sitting on his couch, eating a bowl of instant noodles while watching anime. She looked up at him with wide eyes, noodles hanging from her mouth.
